bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueF, which is very poor for my preferences and gives no reliable sign of concession yet, so I will counter with my strongest valid values on every issue.

At t=0.02 it is very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession to avoid simply repeating my previous all-best offer. The opponent has held firm on all valueF, which is very low utility for me, and there is no message or valid evidence yet that I should make a large concession. I am conceding slightly on issueC to valueB while holding my highest-weight issueA and other important issues at valueA.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid rather than making large concessions. The opponent has repeated the all-valueF offer, which is very poor for me and shows no real concession yet; I will avoid repeating my exact previous bid while keeping my most important issueA at valueA and making only a small tradeoff on issueB.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.856 rather than making major concessions. The opponent has mostly held firm at very low-utility offers for me and has not sent any messages, so there is little evidence of a meaningful concession pattern; I will only make a small concession on issueC while holding my highest-weight issueA at its best value.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.84 because it is still very early in the negotiation and the opponent’s offers remain very poor for me, though their latest move shows a small concession on issueC. I will concede slightly on issueC to the value they have signaled, while holding firm on my most important issueA and other high-value issues.

I am targeting a still-high utility bid around 0.762, since it is early at t=0.10 and there is no need to concede on my most important issueA or on issueD yet. The opponent has been mostly holding firm at low-utility offers for me, with only some movement on issueC toward valueC, so I am matching that signal and adding a modest concession on issueB while avoiding repeating my previous bid.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.84 because it is still very early at t=0.12, so there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held firm on valueF, but they have twice moved issueC to valueC, so I concede on issueC while holding my most important/high-value positions on issueA, issueB, and issueD.

I am targeting a still-strong utility bid because it is early at t=0.14 and the opponent has mostly held firm on very low-value offers to me, with only a concession on issueC toward valueC. I will keep my highest-priority issueA and important issueD at valueA, while offering issueC=valueC, which the opponent has repeatedly signaled, and a moderate concession on issueB.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.16 and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held firm on very low-utility offers for me, with only small movement on issueC and issueA, so I will concede on issueC where they previously signaled some flexibility while holding my highest-weight issueA and issueD at valueA.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.78, since it is early at t=0.18 and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me with only minor concessions on issueC and issueD. I am holding firm on my highest-value issueA and issueD, while conceding moderately on issueB and issueC to test whether movement on lower-cost tradeoffs can improve acceptance chances.

I am targeting a high-utility bid for me, about 0.762 weighted utility, by preserving my most important issueA and issueD at valueA while accepting the opponent’s latest concessions on issueB and issueC. Although time is still early at t=0.20, the opponent’s last offer is a major move toward my preferences compared with their earlier low-utility offers, so matching it is a strong way to lock in a favorable agreement.
